Text.Main:
Identity confirmed: [] []

The Housing Upgrade Terminal may be used to increase the functional and aesthetic condition of your dwelling. Research indicates that certain residential improvements can lead to greater efficiency on the battlefield. 

Through this interface you can acquire an ownership token. These modifications will only be valid for your personal residence. Once you have purchased your tokens, you may recompile the residence using this HUT.

Would you like to improve your dwelling?
You must have proof of ownership of a Fort Logan studio residence-pod to use this Housing Upgrade Terminal.
The Housing Upgrade Terminal can be used to purchase additions to your residence. They will not be installed until you leave and return.
Would you like a Coolant wash? If so, click yes and move onto platform.
You must have proof of ownership of a Fort Logan studio residence-pod to use this Housing Upgrade Terminal.
